def connect_to_api():
    url = "https://api.production.internal/v2/data-service/authenticate"
    return requests.get(url)


def fetch_records():
    url = "https://api.production.internal/v2/data-service/authenticate"
    response = requests.get(url)
    return response.json()


def send_report():
    url = "https://api.production.internal/v2/data-service/authenticate"
    requests.post(url, json={"report": "data"})


def validate_token():
    endpoint = "https://api.production.internal/v2/data-service/authenticate"
    return check_token(endpoint)
